2026-05-05.headline: Iran hits South Korean ship in Strait of Hormuz; Dow falls 1.1% to 48,941

2026-05-05.headline: FedEx plunges 9.1% after Amazon launches Amazon Supply Chain Services network

2026-05-05.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line beats Q1 earnings: $0.23 EPS vs $0.15 expected
2026-05-05.summary: Travel demand proves resilient despite macro concerns; cruise stocks rally as consumer discretionary outperforms on the session.

2026-05-05.headline: Factory orders +1.5% in March, biggest gain since November
2026-05-05.summary: Manufacturing data beats estimates, signaling underlying economic resilience even as geopolitical shocks rattle equity markets.

2026-05-05.headline: S&P 500 -0.4% to 7,200; Nasdaq holds better as tech stocks buffer geopolitical shock

2026-05-06.headline: Apple WWDC 2026 opens: AI-powered Siri AI unveiled alongside new iOS features
2026-05-06.summary: Apple's developer conference showcases deep AI integration; AAPL shares recover 2% as product roadmap impresses investors.

2026-05-06.summary: Markets stabilize near 7,200 support as investors assess whether Iran-Strait risk is transitory or a structural oil market shift.

2026-05-06.headline: Strait of Hormuz risk keeps Brent crude near $100/barrel
2026-05-06.summary: Iranian shipping threats sustain oil market premium; energy sector gains while consumer-facing stocks remain under pressure from fuel cost fears.

2026-05-06.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line +8.6% extends gains on strong Q1 beat and raised guidance
2026-05-06.summary: Post-earnings momentum continues; cruise and travel operators benefit from pent-up demand that is proving insensitive to fuel prices.

2026-05-06.headline: Fed officials signal patience on rates; no urgency to hike despite tight labor market

2026-05-07.headline: Chipmakers bounce: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index +3% recovering Monday-Tuesday losses
2026-05-07.summary: Semiconductor stocks stabilize as investors reassess the Iran risk as oil-related rather than a direct tech headwind.

2026-05-07.headline: FedEx -9% losses hold; UPS and trucking stocks also weaker on Amazon logistics threat
2026-05-07.summary: Amazon's supply chain network seen as a long-term structural threat to the third-party logistics industry beyond just FedEx.

2026-05-07.summary: No further Iranian interdictions reported; Brent pulls back from $100 to $98 as initial panic fades, easing inflation pressure slightly.

2026-05-08.headline: S&P 500 holds 7,250; markets stabilize ahead of next week's critical CPI print
2026-05-08.summary: Investors position cautiously before April CPI on May 12; consensus at 3.7% YoY — a beat could revive rate-hike fears.

2026-05-08.headline: FOMC meeting minutes: Fed requires sustained inflation evidence before considering hike
2026-05-08.summary: Minutes reinforce hold stance; Fed not ready to hike but the bar is lower than markets had assumed — subtle hawkish tilt noted.

2026-05-08.headline: Amazon Supply Chain Services officially launches; logistics sector braces for disruption

2026-05-08.headline: Chip stocks continue recovery; AI demand narrative intact despite geopolitical noise

2026-05-08.headline: Dollar strengthens as Treasury yields stay elevated; EM currencies under pressure
2026-05-08.summary: Strong dollar and high yields create headwinds for emerging market equities; investors prefer domestic US assets ahead of CPI data.

2026-05-09.headline: S&P 500 ends week flat near 7,300; chip sector leads weekly recovery from Iran selloff
2026-05-09.summary: Weekly performance shows markets digested geopolitical shock in 3 days; tech breadth improves as CPI risk premium enters next week.

2026-05-09.headline: Apple WWDC concludes; Siri AI and Vision Pro 2 generate positive analyst notes

2026-05-09.headline: Consumer sentiment rises; spending resilient despite oil shock and inflation fears

2026-05-13.headline: Cisco Q3 earnings beat: AI-driven networking demand accelerates; shares +4%

2026-05-15.headline: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair, succeeding Jerome Powell

2026-05-15.summary: Long-end yields surge on inflation persistence fears; investors demand higher term premium as Warsh's hawkish reputation is repriced into bond markets.

2026-05-15.summary: Economists warn that sustained oil prices near $90-100 will push services inflation higher in coming months, complicating the new Fed Chair's first meetings.

2026-05-16.headline: S&P 500 ends worst week since March; CPI and Warsh confirmation reset rate expectations

2026-05-16.headline: New Fed Chair Warsh signals data-dependence but flags inflation vigilance

2026-05-19.headline: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.19% — highest in nearly 19 years
2026-05-19.summary: Long-end surge driven by inflation persistence and new Fed Chair's hawkish tone; stocks post 3rd straight losing session as discount rates reprice.

2026-05-19.headline: S&P 500 -0.67% to 7,353; Nasdaq -0.84% — tech under pressure from rising yields
2026-05-19.summary: High-multiple tech names most vulnerable to yield surge; investors rotate out of growth into short-duration and value positions.

2026-05-19.headline: Trump cancels planned Iran attacks; ceasefire remains fragile but intact
2026-05-19.summary: De-escalation removes immediate oil spike risk but uncertainty remains; Brent crude pulls back from $105 to $103 on the announcement.

2026-05-19.summary: Yield curve steepens as both short and long rates rise; financial conditions tightening materially without a single Fed hike being delivered.

2026-05-22.headline: US-Iran 60-day ceasefire MOU signed; Brent crude falls to $93.71

2026-05-30.headline: AST SpaceMobile -14.5%; satellite stocks broadly lower on sector developments

2026-06-02.headline: S&P 500 closes above 7,600 for the first time; Nasdaq +0.4% as chip boom continues

2026-06-03.summary: HPE's AI server division drives the upside; management raised full-year revenue guidance citing AI infrastructure orders filling well into 2027.

2026-06-03.summary: Index gains despite tech profit-taking; energy, healthcare, and financials all contribute — a sign the rally is broadening beyond AI.

2026-06-03.headline: Victoria's Secret raises full-year guidance citing lower tariff costs; shares +8%

2026-06-04.summary: Analysts note that the S&P holding flat while the Dow hits records shows sector rotation rather than a broad market breakdown.

2026-06-04.summary: Combination of strong jobs openings, manufacturing expansion, and Broadcom miss shifts focus to Friday's nonfarm payrolls as the definitive market catalyst.

2026-06-05.headline: May jobs report: +172,000 vs 80,000 expected — Fed rate-hike odds surge to 72%

2026-06-05.headline: Nasdaq -4.18% — worst day since April 2025; S&P 500 -2.64% to 7,383
2026-06-05.summary: Double blow of Broadcom's AI chip miss and jobs-driven rate-hike fears hits growth stocks hard; the Nasdaq's plunge ends its run near record highs.

2026-06-05.summary: AVGO's underwhelming AI guidance triggers a sector-wide reassessment; investors who owned chips for the AI premium now questioning the valuation math.

2026-06-05.headline: Treasury yields spike: 10-year hits 4.8% as hot jobs data changes the Fed calculus
2026-06-05.summary: Bond market prices in higher-for-longer rates immediately; the 10-year's move to 4.8% in one session is a severe financial conditions tightening event.

2026-06-05.headline: S&P 500 ends 9-week consecutive weekly winning streak; worst week since March

2026-06-08.headline: Chip stocks rebound sharply: Intel +10% on Alphabet TPU order, Micron recovers ~10% after Friday's 13% drop

2026-06-08.headline: Iran halts military strikes on Israel, easing Middle East tensions that rattled markets over the weekend
2026-06-08.summary: Iran's Foreign Ministry confirmed the cease of operations, reducing geopolitical risk premium and supporting a broader equity recovery Monday.

2026-06-08.headline: Marvell Technology (MRVL) to join S&P 500 on June 22, shares surge 9% in premarket
2026-06-08.summary: Index inclusion will force passive funds to buy MRVL, adding buying pressure; Pool Corp and Campbell's will be removed to make room.

2026-06-08.headline: May jobs report doubled consensus at 172,000 — Treasury yields spike and Fed rate-hike odds jump to 72%
2026-06-08.summary: Stronger-than-expected payrolls triggered Friday's selloff and now set the stage for Wednesday's CPI print, which could push annual inflation to 4.18%.

2026-06-08.headline: Citigroup raises S&P 500 year-end target to 8,100; Cerebras Systems surges 17% on nine bullish initiations
2026-06-08.summary: Citi's upgrade citing AI supercycle and earnings strength reflects growing Wall Street conviction in equities despite macro headwinds.
